text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out shopping...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Awww, this is so cute! ♪ It's<n>probably too
grown-up for me though...<n>But maybe that
contrast would make<n>me look cute!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hm, what to do... Aha! You there! Join<n>me in my
indecision!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yup! There's a sale on right now, and<n>I'm trying
to buy as many cute clothes<n>as I can! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The thing is, I dunno what to get. I'm<n>on a tight
budget this month!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
This fit is super trendy! It's like...<n>BAM! Look at
me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: This one's cute and comfy. Theshop lady said it's the peak offunctional beauty!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Which one do you think I look better<n>in?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I totally agree! I've gotta be the<n>latest and
greatest! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! A little help, please!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I can learn something from<n>Mayano
Top Gun's drive to always<n>be ahead of the pack.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's such a good choice! The<n>comfier the
clothes, the more energy I<n>have to play and
enjoy myself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally going with this one!<n>Lemme go pay for
it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Excuse meee! I'd like to buy this,<n>please!
